ksa_text: Skill in applying data quality standards, best practices, and compliance requirements to assess, evaluate, and improve organizational data assets.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data quality", "data asset"). Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
